metadata.title: Semantic Canvas
metadata.description: Create semantic knowledge graphs using Canvases to modify note properties graphically.

regex.target: Notice(`已成功在2个文件中移除prop。`)

regex.target: .setDesc(`要忽略的属性键的逗号分隔列表（不区分大小写）。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Leave blank to only create properties for labeled edges. Default: cards")
regex.target: .setDesc("留空以仅创建标记边的属性。默认值：卡片")

regex.source: .setDesc("Leave blank to only create properties for labeled edges. Default: urls")

regex.target: .setDesc("留空以仅对带标签的边创建属性。默认：文件")
